phase-summary.outcome: Chat operations now support canonical model instance creation, rename, and canonical-state updates, and persist changes into content bindings used by Space Explorer and bundle build requests.

file.description: Added canonical instance create/rename/state mutation handlers in chat operation engine.
Exposes operation payload preview and user-controlled apply step for canonical asset operations.

tests.test: Typecheck validates canonical operation wiring end-to-end through chat apply callback.

suggestion.gap: Requirements do not define canonical asset lifecycle operations for chat authoring.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: chat authoring must support canonical asset create/rename/toggle and maintain contentBindings consistency.

next.action: Close 50-11 by validating bundle serialization from chat-triggered build operations.
